bleepingcomputer.title: Cognizant TriZetto breach exposes health data of 3.4 million patients
bleepingcomputer.description: TriZetto Provider Solutions, a healthcare IT company that develops software and services used by health insurers and healthcare providers, has suffered a data breach that exposed the sensitive information of over 3.4 million people. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Bill Toulas
bleepingcomputer.intro: TriZetto Provider Solutions 是一家为医疗保险公司和医疗机构开发软件与服务的医疗 IT 公司。该公司发生数据泄露事件，致使超过 340 万人的敏感信息泄露。

bleepingcomputer.title: CISA warns feds to patch iOS flaws exploited in crypto-theft attacks
bleepingcomputer.description: CISA ordered U.S. federal agencies to patch three iOS security flaws targeted in cyberespionage and crypto-theft attacks using the Coruna exploit kit. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sergiu Gatlan
bleepingcomputer.intro: CISA 要求美国联邦机构修补三个 iOS 安全漏洞。攻击者利用 Coruna exploit kit 针对这些漏洞发起网络间谍活动和窃取加密货币。

bleepingcomputer.title: EC-Council Expands AI Certification Portfolio to Strengthen U.S. AI Workforce Readiness and Security
bleepingcomputer.description: EC-Council, creator of the world-renowned Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) credential and a global leader in applied cybersecurity education, today launched its Enterprise AI Credential Suite, with four new role-based AI certifications debuting alongside Certified CISO v4, an overhauled executive cyber leadership program. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sponsored by EC-Council
bleepingcomputer.intro: EC-Council 推出了 Enterprise AI Credential Suite。该机构以 Certified Ethical Hacker 认证闻名，此次发布包含四项新的基于角色的 AI 认证，同时推出的还有经过全面改革的行政网络领导力项目 Certified CISO v4。

bleepingcomputer.title: Fake Claude Code install guides push infostealers in InstallFix attacks
bleepingcomputer.description: Threat actors are employing a new variation of the ClickFix social engineering technique called InstallFix to convince users into running malicious commands under the pretext of installing legitimate command line interface (CLI) tools. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Bill Toulas
bleepingcomputer.intro: 威胁行为者利用一种名为 InstallFix 的 ClickFix 社会工程学新变种进行攻击。他们以安装合法 CLI 工具为借口，诱导用户执行恶意命令。

bleepingcomputer.title: Microsoft 365 Backup to add file-level restore for faster recovery
bleepingcomputer.description: Microsoft will soon begin rolling out a significant upgrade to Microsoft 365 Backup to speed up recovery by allowing administrators to restore individual files and folders. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sergiu Gatlan
bleepingcomputer.intro: 微软即将向 Microsoft 365 Backup 推出一项重大升级。此次更新允许管理员恢复单个文件和文件夹，从而加快恢复速度。

bleepingcomputer.title: Ghanain man pleads guilty to role in $100 million fraud ring
bleepingcomputer.description: A Ghanaian national pleaded guilty to his role in a massive fraud ring that stole over $100 million from victims across the United States through business email compromise attacks and romance scams. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sergiu Gatlan
bleepingcomputer.intro: 一名加纳人承认参与了一个大型诈骗团伙。该团伙通过商务邮件入侵攻击和情感诈骗，从美国受害者手中窃取了超过 1 亿美元。

bleepingcomputer.title: FBI investigates breach of surveillance and wiretap systems
bleepingcomputer.description: The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) confirmed on Thursday that it's investigating a breach that affected systems used to manage surveillance and wiretap warrants. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sergiu Gatlan
bleepingcomputer.intro: 美国联邦调查局周四证实正在调查一起入侵事件。此次事件影响了用于管理监视和窃听令的系统。

bleepingcomputer.title: Chinese state hackers target telcos with new malware toolkit
bleepingcomputer.description: A China-linked advanced persistent threat actor tracked as UAT-9244 has been targeting telecommunication service providers in South America since 2024, compromising Windows, Linux, and network-edge devices. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Bill Toulas
bleepingcomputer.intro: 一个追踪代号为 UAT-9244 且有中国背景的高级持续性威胁组织，自 2024 年起针对南美洲的电信服务提供商发动攻击。该组织入侵了 Windows、Linux 和网络边缘设备。

bleepingcomputer.title: Bing AI promoted fake OpenClaw GitHub repo pushing info-stealing malware
bleepingcomputer.description: Fake OpenClaw installers hosted in GitHub repositories and promoted by Microsoft Bing's AI-enhanced search feature instructed users to run commands that deployed information stealers and proxy malware. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Bill Toulas
bleepingcomputer.intro: 托管在 GitHub 仓库中的虚假 OpenClaw 安装程序被微软 Bing 的 AI 搜索功能推广。这些安装程序诱导用户运行命令，从而部署信息窃取程序和代理恶意软件。

bleepingcomputer.title: Wikipedia hit by self-propagating JavaScript worm that vandalized pages
bleepingcomputer.description: The Wikimedia Foundation suffered a security incident today after a self-propagating JavaScript worm began vandalizing pages and modifying user scripts across multiple wikis. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Lawrence Abrams
bleepingcomputer.intro: 维基媒体基金会今日遭遇安全事件。一种自我传播的 JavaScript 蠕虫开始破坏页面，并修改多个维基站点上的用户脚本。

bleepingcomputer.title: WordPress membership plugin bug exploited to create admin accounts
bleepingcomputer.description: Hackers are exploiting a critical vulnerability in the User Registration & Membership plugin, which is installed on more than 60,000 WordPress sites. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Bill Toulas
bleepingcomputer.intro: 黑客正在利用 User Registration & Membership 插件中的一个严重漏洞。该插件安装在超过 60,000 个 WordPress 网站上。

bleepingcomputer.title: FBI arrests suspect linked to $46M crypto theft from US Marshals
bleepingcomputer.description: ​A U.S. government contractor's son, accused of stealing more than $46 million in cryptocurrency from the U.S. Marshals Service, was arrested Wednesday on the island of Saint Martin. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sergiu Gatlan
bleepingcomputer.intro: 一名美国政府承包商之子涉嫌从美国法警局窃取价值超过 4600 万美元的加密货币。他于周三在圣马丁岛被捕。

bleepingcomputer.title: Google says 90 zero-days were exploited in attacks last year
bleepingcomputer.description: Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) tracked 90 zero-day vulnerabilities actively exploited throughout 2025, almost half of them in enterprise software and appliances. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Bill Toulas
bleepingcomputer.intro: Google Threat Intelligence Group 追踪到 2025 年全年有 90 个零日漏洞遭到利用。其中近半数漏洞存在于企业软件和设备中。

bleepingcomputer.title: 2026 Browser Data Reveals Major Enterprise Security Blind Spots
bleepingcomputer.description: The browser is becoming the operating system for modern work, yet many enterprises still treat it as an extension of network or endpoint security. Keep Aware's 2026 State of Browser Security Report shows 41% of employees used AI web tools while browser-based phishing, extensions, and social engineering drive new security blind spots. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sponsored by Keep Aware
bleepingcomputer.intro: 浏览器正演变为现代工作的操作系统，但许多企业仍将其视为网络或终端安全的附属。Keep Aware 的 2026 年浏览器安全报告显示，41% 的员工使用过 AI 网页工具。与此同时，浏览器钓鱼、扩展程序和社会工程学催生了新的安全盲点。

bleepingcomputer.title: Police dismantles online gambling ring exploiting Ukrainian women
bleepingcomputer.description: Spanish and Ukrainian law enforcement authorities dismantled a criminal ring that exploited war-displaced Ukrainian women to run an online gambling scheme that laundered nearly €4.75 million in illicit proceeds. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Sergiu Gatlan
bleepingcomputer.intro: 西班牙和乌克兰执法部门捣毁了一个犯罪团伙。该团伙利用因战争流离失所的乌克兰女性运营在线赌博平台，以此清洗了近 475 万欧元的非法所得。
